title: DSA Foundations
description: Build each weapon one by one. After this phase you already solve 60% of all interview questions.

mid_phase_checkpoint.message: You now know Arrays + Hashing + Linked Lists + Recursion - 50% of all Indian product company questions solved. Celebrate!

phase_consolidation.title: Phase 2 Consolidation
phase_consolidation.mental_map: Arrays -> Hashing -> Linked Lists -> Stacks -> Queues -> Recursion -> Binary Search -> Sorting -> Trees -> BST -> Heaps -> Graphs
mixed_problems: Use hashing to detect duplicates in an array.
Reverse a linked list and explain time complexity.
Find next greater element using stack.
Binary search in rotated sorted array.
Implement merge sort and analyze complexity.
Check if a binary tree is balanced.
Find kth largest element using a heap.
Detect cycle in an undirected graph using BFS.
Queue-based level order traversal of a tree.
Find diameter of a binary tree.
Top K frequent elements using heap + hashing.
Shortest path in unweighted graph using BFS.
weak_spot_tasks: 20-min Arrays recap: two pointers + prefix sums
20-min Binary Search recap: search on answer

linkedin_card.headline: I just finished DSA Foundations on DSA OS - 60% of interviews are now easy for me ⚔️
